title: Matera Featured in Leaders in Payments Podcast
excerpt: Matera VP of Strategy and Marketing, Sarah Hoisington, joins Leaders in Payments Podcast for their Anytime Anywhere Payments series to discuss the evolution of
body:
Matera VP of Strategy and Marketing, Sarah Hoisington, joins Leaders in Payments Podcast for their Anytime Anywhere Payments series to discuss the evolution of QR codes and their role in transforming traditional payment methods.

Listen to the podcast on [Leaders in Payments](https://leadersinpayments.com/anytime-anywhere-payments-sarah-hoisington-vp-of-strategy-marketing-at-matera-episode-275/).
